[30 min, 24 min, 18 min, 12 min, 6 min are the time span of
tatvas in odd and even yamas. 'In odd yama it would be in the
sequence of Earth, Water, Fire, Air, Sky and in even yama it
would be in the reverse sequence Sky, Air, Fire, Water, Earth]
1 Y ama = I sequence of 5 tatvas = 90 min
Sequence in odd yama =Earth, Water, Fire, Air, Sky
Sequence in even yama =Sky, Air, Fire, Water, Earth

Rhythm of Day 41
Earth =VA Khati = 30 min
Water = 1 Khati = 24 min
Fire =% Khati = 18min
Air = Yz Khati = 12min
Sky ='A Khati =6min
This is applicable only when day duration is 12 hours (30
Khati). When day span and night span changes, the time span
assigned to tatvas will also change proportionately. That is,
